summary: Comprehensive testing of Vaal Vibes PWA completed. Backend APIs working well (94.4% success rate), admin functionality fully operational, but customer login form has critical input field issues preventing full customer flow testing.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Promo validation and redemption not working

ui_bugs.issue: Input fields have incorrect data-testid attributes pointing to div elements instead of actual input fields
Menu items not displaying (0 items found)

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test customer login due to form input accessibility issues

passed_tests: Public landing page loads with Vaal Vibes branding
Hero section displays correctly with stats
Events page loads with 2 event cards
Admin login works with MFA code 246810
Admin dashboard loads with KPIs and charts
PWA manifest is valid and complete
Customer wallet and request creation APIs
Admin CRUD operations for events and specials
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix customer login form data-testid attributes to point to actual input elements instead of div containers. Fix menu items not displaying on menu page. Address promo signature validation issue in backend.
